title: Lunney's Shift Handoff Annotation
description: A single page of notes passed from Glynn Lunney to Gene Kranz at the shift change — the summary of decisions made during the Black Team's watch. Most entries are terse and procedural. One entry, near the bottom, is different: 'Power-down sequence step 7 (GUIDO recommendation): concern flagged by [name redacted], not escalated. Monitoring.' The name is redacted with a single horizontal line, but the controller's call sign is visible at the edge of the redaction: 'GU' — the GUIDO station. The concern was logged. It was not acted on.
